description: Reading the .length property of a tainted value yields an integer; its decimal representation cannot contain HTML metacharacters. Even though req.query.items is tainted, count = items.length is TypeKind::Int and should not fire taint-unsanitised-flow when concatenated into an innerHTML sink.

expected.notes: arr.length is always numeric — inferred as TypeKind::Int by type-fact analysis, so HTML_ESCAPE on innerHTML is suppressed (numeric value cannot XSS)
